name: Musashino Kogyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Musashino Kogyo Co., Ltd. engages in the movie entertainment, real estate, and commercial businesses. The company is involved in the distribution and operation of movie theater shops. It also engages in the investment, leasing, arrangement, and sale of tenant buildings; and sale of goods, etc. Musashino Kogyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
